## Description

_Provide a short summary explaining the purpose of this pull request_

> Example:  
> This pull request adds an underline to all desktop header sections based on the Figma design.

## Related Issue(s)

Closes #issue-number

> Example
> (#001)[https://issue-url.com/#001]

- [ ] Feature 2 (brief description)
- [ ] Refactoring / cleanup

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Include screenshots or screen recordings to show UI changes or interactions.

---

## Acceptance Criteria


- [ ] Changes have been tested locally (mobile + desktop)
- [ ] Follows the style guide and naming conventions (e.g. kebab-case)
- [ ] Matches design spec (e.g. from Figma)
- [ ] No `console.log` or warnings
- [ ] All images have `alt` text
- [ ] Headings follow correct order (no skipping levels)
